Petition For Order Determining That Certain Assets Are Included In Trust
Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Continued To Jul-14-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Ferguson, via ZOOM, counsel for Kevin Yost and Kimberly Goddard, Petitioners.

The court begins by pointing counsel to the fact that despite previous tentative rulings with repeated requests by the Examiner, he has yet to provide the court with a courtesy copy of the petition, a copy of the trust as referenced in the petition and, notice was filed on an incorrect form. Counsel requests a continuance to obtain waivers of notice as there seem to be only two beneficiaries. The court reminds counsel that this is not the first calling of this matter and it is still not ready to go. Counsel is advised that this will be the last continuance granted by the court and if the matter is not ready to proceed by the next hearing date, the court will take the matter off calendar.

The Petition for order Determining That Certain Assets, etc., is continued to June 22, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Counsel is directed to file papers by June 15, 2021.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

***At the request of the assigned Examiner, this matter will be continued to July 14, 2021.

Petition For Order Determining That Certain Assets Are Included In Trust
Off Calendar Apr-13-2021 Continued To Jun-01-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Ferguson appeared by zoom for Kevin Yost and Kimberly Goddard (Petitioners).

Mr. Ferguson stated that he thought he would get Examiner's notes telling him what was wrong and requested a continuance to get things filed. The Court informed Mr. Ferguson that he needs to file an amendment and a notice of hearing on form DE-115. The Petition for Order Determining that Certain Assets are Included in Trust is continued to June 1, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
